projects.name: Wrong Floor
projects.description: A stylish round-based heist game set in an elevator. Features a unique silhouette art style with black-filled characters and white outlines. Players navigate floors, avoid entities, and repossess the item before the elevator moves on.

projects.name: Outcome Memories Rewritten
projects.tagline: Asymmetrical horror game with SEGA characters
projects.description: A fast paced, Asymmetrical game with SEGA characters.
features: Wide variety of killers and survivors with different playstyles
Unique visuals to complement the artstyle
